steps.title: Trace the line at x = 4000
steps.content: The line of best fit predicts the temperature. At $x=4000$ feet, the line has $y=35$, so the predicted temperature is $35^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Optional line check
steps.content: A quick model check uses two points on the fit line, such as $(0,47)$ and $(4000,35)$. The fitted model returns $35$ when $x=4000$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The predicted temperature is $35$, which matches choice B.
